'''Lom Portom''' was one of the co-directors of the [[Stark Commercial Combine]]. Alongside fellow co-director [[Trodos]], he led the Stark Collective forces in the [[Fifth Battle of Qotile]] in [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]]. During the battle, Portom was trapped with his troops in a cave and devoured by [[challat eater]]s.
